creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
On my machine is still broken (doesn't fetch) since jWalterWeatherman is "misspelled" 

`spf13:jWalterWeatherman:0efa520:jww/vendor/github.com/spf13/jwalterweatherman`

should be

`spf13:jwalterweatherman:0efa520:jww/vendor/github.com/spf13/jwalterweatherman`

I build it on my laptop, but it needs tests
